Companies Registry.title: Companies Registry
Companies Registry.description: Search Hong Kong company records, file annual returns, and access the Integrated Companies Registry Information System (ICRIS).

HKLII.title: HKLII
HKLII.description: Search Hong Kong company law case law including unfair prejudice petitions, winding-up judgments, and directors' duty decisions.

Hong Kong e-Legislation.title: Hong Kong e-Legislation
Hong Kong e-Legislation.description: Official Companies Ordinance (Cap 622) and winding-up provisions under Cap 32, with commentary and cross-references.
